description: CompositionGrey sweatshirt made of 80% polyester and 12% spandex, has long raglan sleeves with asymmetrical cuffs, a mock neck with a half zippered placket and printed branding logo on the left chestFitComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironWelcome the winter in style this season with this sweatshirt from nike. The fabric is sure to keep the winter chill at bay, while you look stylish with the asymmetrical sleeve cuff. Wear this sweatshirt over jeans to keep the cold wind away.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
